content.en: Look for the green icon with a phone. It might say FaceTime or WeChat. Tap it once to open.
content.zh: 寻找带有电话的绿色图标。它可能显示为FaceTime或微信。点击一次打开。

visual.description: SCREENSHOT: Phone home screen with FaceTime/WeChat icon circled in green

en: What if I can't find the app?
Is FaceTime the same as WeChat?
Can you show me again?
zh: 如果我找不到应用怎么办？

content.en: Look at your list of contacts. Find the person you want to call. Tap their name once.
content.zh: 查看您的联系人列表。找到您想要呼叫的人。点击他们的名字一次。

visual.description: SCREENSHOT: Contact list with one contact highlighted

en: How do I add a new contact?
What if I tap the wrong person?
Can I search for a name?
zh: 如果我点错了人怎么办？

content.en: Look for the video camera button. It's usually green or blue. Tap it once to start the call.
content.zh: 寻找视频摄像头按钮。它通常是绿色或蓝色的。点击一次开始通话。

visual.description: SCREENSHOT: Contact details screen with video call button circled

en: What if they don't answer?
Can I turn off my camera?
How long can I talk?
zh: 如果他们不接听怎么办？

content.en: You'll see their face on the screen. Speak normally. They can see and hear you too!
content.zh: 您会在屏幕上看到他们的脸。正常说话。他们也能看到和听到您！

visual.description: SCREENSHOT: Active video call screen showing remote person

en: Why can't I see them clearly?
How do I make it louder?
Can I switch cameras?

content.en: When you're done talking, look for the red button. Tap it once to hang up. That's it!
content.zh: 当您说完话后，寻找红色按钮。点击一次挂断。就这样！

visual.description: SCREENSHOT: Video call screen with red end call button circled

en: What if I tap the wrong button?
Can I call them back?
Did I do something wrong?
zh: 如果我点错了按钮怎么办？

content.en: Find the colorful map icon on your phone. It has red, yellow, blue, and green colors. Tap it once.
content.zh: 在手机上找到彩色地图图标。它有红色、黄色、蓝色和绿色。点击一次。

visual.description: SCREENSHOT: Phone home screen with Google Maps icon circled

en: What if I don't have this app?
Is this the same as Apple Maps?
Do I need internet?
zh: 如果我没有这个应用怎么办？

content.en: At the top, you'll see a search box. Tap it once. Type the place you want to go, like 'library' or 'grocery store'.
content.zh: 在顶部，您会看到一个搜索框。点击一次。输入您想去的地方，比如图书馆或超市。

visual.description: SCREENSHOT: Google Maps with search bar highlighted and keyboard visible

en: What if I spell it wrong?
Can I search by address?
How do I use my voice?

content.en: After you find your place, tap the blue 'Directions' button. Then tap the blue 'Start' button at the bottom.
content.zh: 找到您的地点后，点击蓝色的路线按钮。然后点击底部的蓝色开始按钮。

visual.description: SCREENSHOT: Google Maps showing directions button and start navigation button

en: Can I choose walking or driving?
What if I want to go later?
How do I see the whole route?
zh: 我可以选择步行或开车吗？
如果我想稍后去怎么办？

content.en: The map will show you where to go. Listen to the voice telling you when to turn. The blue dot is you!
content.zh: 地图会告诉您去哪里。听语音告诉您何时转弯。蓝点就是您！

visual.description: SCREENSHOT: Active navigation screen with blue dot and route highlighted

en: What if I miss a turn?
Can I make it louder?
What if I get lost?
zh: 如果我错过了转弯怎么办？
